overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game depicting a dimly lit ramen shop interior. The scene begins behind the service counter with two workers, transitions through a kitchen area with prominent neon signage, and moves into a dining area filled with seated patrons. The atmosphere is characterized by red paper lanterns, warm neon lighting, and a blend of traditional and futuristic decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: service counter area behind the bar

agents.ego_description: standing stationary behind the counter observing the two workers and the service area

notable_agents.action: female worker in white shirt leaning on the counter facing away from camera
male worker in white tank top leaning on the counter to the right

entered.detail: traditional red spherical paper lanterns hanging from ceiling with black Japanese characters
long metallic counter surface with green trim separating service area from dining
large window showing neon-lit street scene outside with passing vehicles
tall metallic stools lined up at the counter edge

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary behind the service counter of a ramen shop, observing two workers leaning on the counter. Red paper lanterns hang overhead casting a warm glow, while a window reveals a neon-lit street outside. The atmosphere is calm and static before movement begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen preparation area with cooking stations

events.description: camera begins moving forward along the counter, passing the two workers
transitioning from service counter to kitchen area with visible cooking equipment and neon signage

agents.ego_description: moving along the counter past the workers, approaching the kitchen preparation area

notable_agents.action: female worker with dark hair continuing to work at the counter as camera passes
blonde customer sitting at the counter holding a green glowing drink

entered.detail: circular neon sign with red Japanese characters ラーメン and bowl illustration
large stainless steel cooking pots and industrial kitchen appliances
small screen displaying animated content on the kitchen wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along the service counter, passing the two workers and revealing the kitchen area. A prominent circular neon ramen sign glows on the right wall, while stainless steel cooking equipment and steam vents become visible. The camera continues past a seated customer with a green drink, transitioning from the service area toward the dining room.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dining area with booth and table seating

events.description: entering the main dining area with multiple tables and seated customers
slowing pace while navigating between occupied dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the dining area between tables, observing seated patrons

notable_agents.action: patron in yellow tank top sitting with back to camera at a table
patron in green jacket sitting at table with a drink, turning to look around

entered.detail: rectangular wooden tables with yellow surfaces and condiment caddies
large black dome-shaped pendant lights suspended over the dining area
large decorative mural depicting koi fish or aquatic scene on the back wall
illuminated digital display showing menu items and prices

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main dining area filled with wooden tables and seated patrons. Large pendant lights hang overhead illuminating the space, while a large wall mural provides decoration. The camera moves past various customers including a person in a yellow tank top and another in a green jacket, continuing toward the back of the restaurant past a digital menu board.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the quiet service area of a ramen shop into a bustling, neon-lit dining room. It begins stationary behind the service counter under the warm glow of red paper lanterns, observing two workers with a neon-lit street visible through a window. As the camera moves forward, it passes the workers to reveal a kitchen area characterized by stainless steel equipment and a prominent circular neon ramen sign. The scene then expands as the camera glides past a customer with a green drink and enters the main dining area, where large pendant lights illuminate wooden tables and a decorative wall mural. Finally, the movement continues past various patrons in colorful clothing and a digital menu board toward the back of the restaurant.
